payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. These relationships are incompatible for the same person, so this should not be durably committed as current fact without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The same name 'Sara' may refer to the same person, but the new kinship claim directly conflicts with existing memory and could also indicate a different Sara. Ambiguity is unresolved.

details: Detected a direct conflict between existing and incoming relationship facts.
Did not create or update durable memory cards.
Preserved ambiguity instead of overwriting existing memory.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.
If it is the same person, ask which relationship is correct now.
If there are two different people named Sara, create separate entities with distinguishing details.
